HAZ_TRAJ_DEV.scenario: Automated driving on public roads (all operational scenarios)
HAZ_TRAJ_DEV.title: Vehicle Not Following Intended Trajectory

SG_01.safe_state: Maintain current vehicle state with controlled deceleration
SG_01.title: VDC Must Set Target Wheel Torque When Required

SG_02.title: VDC Must Set Target Wheel Torque Only When Required

SG_03.safe_state: Maintain current steering angle with gradual return to center
SG_03.title: VDC Must Set Target Steering Angle When Required

SG_04.safe_state: Maintain intended steering angle, reject spurious commands
SG_04.title: VDC Must Set Target Steering Angle Only When Required

SG_05.title: WRDC Must Change Target Brake Torque When Required

SG_06.title: WRDC Must Change Target Brake Torque Only When Required

SG_07.safe_state: Maintain current speed with controlled adjustment
SG_07.title: WRDC Must Change Target Drive Torque When Required

SG_08.title: WRDC Must Change Target Drive Torque Only When Required

SG_09.title: Anti-lock Control Must Be Performed Only When Required

SG_10.safe_state: Activate ABS to prevent wheel lock and maintain steerability
SG_10.title: Anti-lock Control Must Be Performed When Required

SG_11.title: Anti-spin Control Must Be Performed Only When Required

SG_12.safe_state: Activate ASR to prevent wheel spin and maintain traction
SG_12.title: Anti-spin Control Must Be Performed When Required

SG_13.safe_state: Maintain minimum safe speed or controlled stop
SG_13.title: Drive Controller Must Apply Drive Torque When Required

SG_14.safe_state: Zero torque or engine braking only
SG_14.title: Drive Controller Must Apply Drive Torque Only When Required

SG_15.title: Brake Controller Must Engage Brake When Required

SG_16.title: Brake Controller Must Engage Brake Only When Required

SG_17.safe_state: Gradual return to neutral steering position
SG_17.title: SC Must Change Steering Angle When Required

SG_18.title: SC Must Change Steering Angle Only When Required

SG_19.title: SC Must Hold Steering Angle When Required

SG_20.title: SC Must Hold Steering Angle Only When Required
